intent: Add one synthetic optional role note inside the crew briefing contract so fixture A collides on the same Team atom without sharing B's patch window.
patch:
diff --git a/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts b/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts
--- a/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts
+++ b/packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts
@@ -742,23 +742,24 @@ export function buildMinimalTaskCrewBriefingContract(
   const optionalRoles: TeamCrewRole[] = [
     {
       role: 'Reader',
       agentId: 'reader',
       required: false,
       permissions: ['file.read'],
       description: 'Gathers source context when the task needs discovery.'
     },
     {
       role: 'Evidence Collector',
       agentId: 'evidence-collector',
       required: false,
       permissions: ['file.read'],
       description: 'Packages command-backed evidence for the report.'
     },
+    {
+      role: 'Collision Sentinel',
+      agentId: 'scope-guardian',
+      required: false,
+      permissions: ['file.read'],
+      description: 'Observes the crew briefing atom for same-atom negative-control collisions.'
+    },
     {
       role: 'Scope Guardian',
       agentId: 'scope-guardian',
       required: false,
       permissions: ['file.read'],
       description: 'Watches for out-of-scope file drift.'
     }
   ];
rollback: Remove the synthetic optional-role addition from the proposal fixture and regenerate the JSON if the control lane changes.
